title: Wild Asters
content:
In the spring I asked the daisies
If his words were true,
And the clever, clear-eyed daisies
Always knew.

Now the fields are brown and barren,
Bitter autumn blows,
And of all the stupid asters
Not one knows.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "Wild Asters"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
